title: Add SCIM group sync retry jitter
author: rina
summary: Adds bounded jitter to SCIM retries after Okta rate limits.

title: Cache workspace entitlement lookups
author: leo
summary: Caches plan entitlement reads for 60 seconds.

title: Tighten admin audit log schema
author: viv
summary: Adds request_id and actor_ip to admin audit events.

title: Ship invite resend UI polish
author: chris
summary: Updates empty states and copy for invite resend.

title: Reduce metrics cardinality for queue workers
author: noor
summary: Buckets queue labels to reduce Prometheus load.

title: Normalize login redirect URIs before session exchange
author: maya
summary: Refactors enterprise SSO callback handling and introduces redirect URI normalization.

title: Add null guard for account settings avatars
author: chris
summary: Prevents missing avatar URLs from breaking account settings.

title: Move billing export to async job
author: leo
summary: Queues CSV exports instead of serving them inline.

title: Bump node base image for web app
author: sam
summary: Updates Node patch version in the frontend container.

title: Add SAML relay state validation
author: priya
summary: Adds explicit validation for SAML relay_state values.

title: Use batched reads for notification preferences
author: nolan
summary: Reduces duplicate preference reads during digest fanout.

title: Rollback auth redirect normalization
author: maya
summary: Reverts PR 206 after enterprise login failures.

title: Add enterprise callback regression coverage
author: priya
summary: Adds tests for vanity-domain SSO callback URLs and encoded relay state.

title: Increase auth-api Sentry sampling during incident follow-up
author: erin
summary: Temporarily increases sampling for SSO callback errors.

title: Fix support inbox assignment race
author: max
summary: Prevents duplicate owner assignment when tickets arrive in bursts.

title: Harden password reset token parser
author: priya
summary: Rejects malformed reset token payloads earlier.

title: Add webhook delivery dead-letter replay
author: noor
summary: Allows replaying failed webhook deliveries from DLQ.

title: Trim auth session cleanup query
author: leo
summary: Limits session cleanup to expired rows older than 24 hours.

title: Improve workspace switcher keyboard nav
author: chris
summary: Adds arrow key handling to the workspace switcher.

title: Pin Redis client after timeout regression
author: erin
summary: Pins Redis client version after connection timeout reports.

title: Add organization domain verification banner
author: viv
summary: Shows admins when domain verification is incomplete.

title: Prototype passkey enrollment flow
author: maya
summary: Experimental passkey enrollment behind a disabled flag.

title: Backfill missing invoice tax regions
author: leo
summary: Adds a one-off migration to backfill tax regions.

title: Document incident response checklist
author: jamie
summary: Updates incident roles and rollback checklist.

title: Add per-tenant feature flag export
author: nolan
summary: Exports flag state snapshots for support tooling.

title: Make SSO callback canonicalization idempotent
author: priya
summary: Reintroduces redirect canonicalization with tenant-aware allowlist checks.

title: Tune API gateway idle timeout
author: erin
summary: Raises gateway idle timeout for long-running exports.

title: Add auth callback dashboard panel
author: noor
summary: Adds panels for SSO callback errors by tenant and IdP.

title: Update enterprise SSO runbook screenshots
author: jamie
summary: Refreshes screenshots in the enterprise SSO support runbook.

title: Queue audit log exports by workspace
author: nolan
summary: Adds workspace-partitioned audit export jobs.
